---
title: "Security policy"
description: "UIAO vulnerability reporting and disclosure policy — rendered from the canonical SECURITY.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta, security]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`SECURITY.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../SECURITY.md >}}
